title: Extract localized-disease outcomes across included studies
context: With the register frozen, this task extracts localized-disease ES outcome records across the included studies into schema-valid, provenance-complete rows. This is one half of the disease-extent extraction split (localized; metastatic/relapsed is eoh-extract-104). Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Extract localized-disease ES outcome records across the included studies into schema-valid, fully sourced rows passing all CI gates.
acceptanceCriteria: Localized-disease outcome records extracted across included studies; every record cites DOI/PMID + source table/figure + license.
Every record is schema-valid and passes provenance, min-cell, and no-unsourced-number CI gates.
Records double-extracted per the QA protocol; discrepancies routed to adjudication (eoh-qa-105).
output: /output/datasets/outcomes-localized/ schema-valid records, committed to the repo.
